text: Moving from the glass-walled meeting room to this vibrant, informative display leaves me feeling activated and curious. The environment is charged with creativity, like stepping into a crossroads of reason and wonder. The presence of research, development, and poetic ambiguity on the walls makes me reflect on the constructed nature of knowledge—how certainty is elusive, yet the pursuit itself feels almost exhilarating. Here, I am both subject and observer, participating in the dance between clarity and confusion.
